caption: AI infrastructure fragility — isometric crumbling tech stack tower showing how typical AI pipelines collapse when built on disconnected services (Relational DB, Vector DB, Cache, Queue, LLM Gateway) without database-enforced transactions, constraints, or rollback mechanisms; failures detected late and expensively
alt_text: Isometric crumbling tower of disconnected AI service layers with cracks and falling pieces, representing fragile AI infrastructure without database-level safety controls
